title: Jump-proof Farmland
description: Prevents farmland to convert back to dirt when jumping on it
body: # Jump-proof Farmland Tired to farm again the dirt after fall on it? You're in the right place at the right moment! This small fabric mod prevents farmland to convert back to dirt when jumping on it   No needed of any library, this is a stand-alone mod No addition of blocks or items No needed to be added before world generation * This mod only prevents the farmand from being destroyed after a jump (possibly also boosted by effect).
